news_results.title: Bitcoin extends decline, falling below $63,000 before paring some losses
news_results.description: Bitcoin tumbled more than 5% to fall below $63,000 on Tuesday as investors continued to grapple with escalating tariff tensions and broader geopolitical risks.

news_results.title: Bitcoin falls as much as 5% as Trump tariff moves raise uncertainty
